seoTitle: Novosense News | Product Announcements and Company Updates | LiTong

faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong provides comprehensive support for all Novosense products including newly announced ones. Our support includes: Immediate sample availability for evaluation and prototyping. faqs.decisionGuide: Contact LiTong immediately when new products are announced of interest. Request samples, evaluation boards, and technical documentation. Engage FAE support for design integration assistance.

news.title: Novosense Launches NSi6602 High-Performance Isolated Gate Driver for SiC MOSFET Applications
news.summary: Novosense introduces the NSi6602 isolated gate driver with 4A/6A drive capability, 5kVrms reinforced isolation, and 150kV/us CMTI, specifically designed for SiC MOSFET and high-power IGBT applications in EV chargers and solar inverters.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has announced the launch of the NSi6602, a high-performance isolated gate driver designed specifically for silicon carbide (SiC) MOSFET and high-power IGBT applications. The NSi6602 addresses the growing demand for reliable, high-speed switching in electric vehicle onboard chargers, solar inverters, and industrial motor drives.
## Key Features

The NSi6602 features 4A source and 6A sink current capability, enabling fast switching of SiC MOSFETs with large gate charge requirements. The device provides 5kVrms reinforced isolation with 1.5kVrms working voltage, meeting safety requirements for 800V automotive and industrial applications.

With propagation delay of just 65ns and CMTI (Common-Mode Transient Immunity) exceeding 150kV/us, the NSi6602 ensures reliable operation in high dv/dt environments typical of SiC switching applications. The integrated Miller clamp prevents false turn-on in half-bridge configurations, while desaturation detection provides short-circuit protection.
## Target Applications

The NSi6602 is ideal for: Electric Vehicle Onboard Chargers (OBC) requiring high-efficiency power conversion, Solar Inverters with SiC MOSFET power stages for improved efficiency, Industrial Motor Drives using high-speed switching for precise control, and Server Power Supplies requiring high-density, high-efficiency designs.
## Availability

The NSi6602 is available now in SOP-16 wide body package. Samples and evaluation boards are available through LiTong Electronics, authorized Novosense distributor. Contact LiTong for pricing, samples, and technical support.

news.title: Novosense Expands AEC-Q100 Qualified Product Portfolio for Automotive Applications
news.summary: Novosense announces expanded AEC-Q100 qualification coverage with new automotive-grade digital isolators, gate drivers, and transceivers, supporting the growing electric vehicle and autonomous driving markets.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has significantly expanded its AEC-Q100 qualified product portfolio, reinforcing its commitment to the automotive electronics market. The expanded qualification includes additional products across digital isolators, isolated gate drivers, and isolated transceivers, providing automotive designers with comprehensive isolation solutions.
## New AEC-Q100 Qualified Products

The newly qualified products include: NSi8220-Q1 and NSi8240-Q1 digital isolators for signal isolation in battery management and motor control systems, NSi6602-Q1 and NSi6230-Q1 isolated gate drivers for traction inverter and OBC applications, NSi1050-Q1 and NSi81C85-Q1 isolated transceivers for BMS communication networks.

All automotive-grade products are qualified to AEC-Q100 Grade 1 (-40C to +125C), meeting the stringent reliability requirements for under-hood and passenger compartment applications. The qualification includes comprehensive testing for temperature cycling, biased HAST, ESD, and latch-up immunity.
## Support for Electric Vehicles

The expanded automotive portfolio directly addresses the needs of electric vehicle manufacturers, providing isolation solutions for battery management systems, motor drives, onboard chargers, and DC-DC converters. Novosense also provides PPAP documentation support for automotive production requirements.
## LiTong Support

LiTong Electronics, as an authorized Novosense core distributor, provides full support for automotive qualification including PPAP documentation, technical consultation, and application engineering support. Contact LiTong for automotive product availability and pricing.

news.title: Novosense and LiTong Strengthen Partnership to Serve Industrial Automation Market
news.summary: Novosense and LiTong Electronics announce enhanced distribution partnership with expanded inventory, technical support, and local FAE coverage for industrial automation customers across Asia.
content: Novosense Microelectronics and LiTong Electronics have announced an enhanced distribution partnership focused on serving the industrial automation market. The strengthened partnership includes expanded inventory, enhanced technical support capabilities, and increased local FAE coverage.
## Partnership Expansion

Under the enhanced agreement, LiTong will maintain increased inventory levels of Novosense products including digital isolators, gate drivers, and isolated transceivers. This ensures faster delivery times for industrial customers with urgent requirements.

LiTong has also expanded its FAE team with additional engineers trained specifically on Novosense isolation and signal chain products. These FAEs provide local technical support including design review, application guidance, and troubleshooting assistance.
## Focus on Industrial Automation

The partnership specifically targets industrial automation applications including motor drives, PLCs, industrial communication networks, and power supplies. Reference designs and application notes for these applications are available through LiTong.
## Technical Support Services

LiTong now offers comprehensive technical support services for Novosense products including schematic review, PCB layout guidance, EMC design review, and thermal analysis. Contact LiTong FAE team for assistance with your industrial automation designs.

news.title: Novosense Achieves IATF 16949 Certification for Automotive Quality Management
news.summary: Novosense receives IATF 16949 certification, demonstrating commitment to automotive quality standards and enabling expanded support for Tier 1 automotive suppliers and OEMs.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has successfully achieved IATF 16949:2016 certification for its quality management system, demonstrating the company's commitment to meeting the stringent quality requirements of the automotive industry.
## IATF 16949 Certification

The IATF 16949 certification is the global standard for quality management systems in the automotive industry. It encompasses ISO 9001 requirements along with additional automotive-specific requirements for design, development, production, and installation of automotive products.

The certification audit covered Novosense's product design processes, supplier management, manufacturing controls, and customer satisfaction processes. All aspects of the quality management system met or exceeded IATF requirements.
## Benefits for Automotive Customers

The IATF 16949 certification provides automotive customers with confidence in Novosense's quality management capabilities. Benefits include: Consistent product quality through robust process controls, Full traceability from raw materials to finished products, Comprehensive failure analysis and corrective action processes, Continuous improvement programs, and PPAP documentation support.
## LiTong Automotive Support

LiTong Electronics supports automotive customers with Novosense products through PPAP documentation, technical consultation, and supply chain management. Contact LiTong for automotive product inquiries and qualification support.

news.title: Novosense Increases R&D Investment in Isolation Technology and Wide Bandgap Applications
news.summary: Novosense announces increased R&D investment focusing on next-generation isolation technology and optimized solutions for wide bandgap semiconductor applications including SiC and GaN.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has announced a significant increase in research and development investment, focusing on next-generation isolation technology and optimized solutions for wide bandgap semiconductor applications.
## R&D Investment Focus

The increased R&D investment targets three key areas: Next-generation isolation technology with higher CMTI and lower power consumption, Optimized gate drivers for SiC and GaN power devices, and Integrated solutions combining isolation, power, and communication functions.
## Wide Bandgap Focus

Wide bandgap semiconductors including SiC and GaN are enabling higher efficiency and higher frequency power conversion. Novosense is developing specialized isolation and gate drive solutions optimized for these fast-switching devices, including higher CMTI ratings and improved noise immunity.
## Product Roadmap

The R&D investment will support new product introductions including: Higher voltage isolated gate drivers for 1200V SiC applications, Ultra-high CMTI isolators (>200kV/us) for GaN applications, Integrated isolated power solutions reducing external component count, and Automotive-qualified versions of all new products.
## LiTong Early Access Program

LiTong Electronics provides early access to new Novosense products for strategic customers. Contact LiTong to participate in the early access program and receive advance information on new product development.

news.title: Novosense Releases Comprehensive Solar Inverter Reference Design
news.summary: Novosense introduces complete reference design for 50kW three-phase solar inverter featuring SiC MOSFETs, isolated gate drivers, and optimized power stage design for maximum efficiency.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has released a comprehensive reference design for a 50kW three-phase solar inverter, showcasing the company's isolation and signal chain products in a high-efficiency renewable energy application.
## Reference Design Features

The reference design features: SiC MOSFET power stage with NSi6602 isolated gate drivers, 5kVrms reinforced isolation between control and power stages, NSi8240 digital isolators for PWM signal isolation, NSC2860 current sense amplifiers for precise current monitoring, and NSi1050 isolated RS-485 for grid communication.
## Performance Specifications

The reference design achieves: Peak efficiency of 99.5% at full load, Switching frequency of 50kHz with SiC MOSFETs, Power density of 3.5kW/L, THD <3% at rated power, and Full protection including overcurrent, overvoltage, and overtemperature.
## Design Resources

Novosense provides complete design resources including: Detailed schematic and PCB layout files, Complete BOM with sourcing information, Application note with design guidelines, Thermal analysis and recommendations, and EMC optimization guidelines.
## LiTong Support

LiTong Electronics provides the reference design and all supporting documentation. Contact LiTong FAE team for design review services and assistance with customizing the reference design for your specific requirements.

news.title: Novosense Receives Innovation Award for Digital Isolation Technology
news.summary: Novosense recognized with industry innovation award for breakthrough digital isolation technology achieving industry-leading CMTI performance and reliability.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has been recognized with a prestigious industry innovation award for its breakthrough digital isolation technology. The award acknowledges Novosense's achievement in developing digital isolators with industry-leading CMTI performance and long-term reliability.
## Award Recognition

The innovation award, presented at the annual Semiconductor Industry Awards ceremony, recognizes Novosense's proprietary magnetic coupling isolation technology. The technology achieves CMTI ratings exceeding 200kV/us while maintaining low power consumption and high reliability.
## Technical Achievement

Novosense's isolation technology addresses critical challenges in modern power electronics: High CMTI for reliable operation in fast-switching SiC and GaN applications, Low power consumption enabling high-density designs, >50-year isolation lifetime for long-term reliability, and Robust EMC performance for industrial environments.
## Industry Impact

The award highlights Novosense's growing impact on the isolation market, providing cost-effective alternatives to traditional optocouplers and competing isolation technologies. Novosense products are now widely adopted in industrial automation, automotive, and renewable energy applications.
## LiTong Congratulations

LiTong Electronics congratulates Novosense on this well-deserved recognition. As an authorized core distributor, we are proud to represent Novosense and bring these innovative products to our customers. Contact LiTong to learn more about Novosense award-winning isolation technology.

news.title: Novosense Reports Strong International Growth with Expanded Global Distribution
news.summary: Novosense announces significant growth in international markets with expanded distribution network and increased market share in Europe and North America.
content: Novosense Microelectronics has reported strong growth in international markets, with significant increases in revenue from Europe and North America. The company has expanded its global distribution network to support growing demand for its isolation and signal chain products.
## International Growth

Novosense's international revenue grew by 45% year-over-year, driven by strong demand in industrial automation, automotive, and renewable energy markets. The company has successfully established partnerships with major distributors across Europe and North America.
## Distribution Expansion

The expanded distribution network includes: Authorized distributors in major European markets including Germany, France, and UK, Distribution partnerships in North America covering US and Canada, Enhanced logistics capabilities for faster delivery, and Local technical support through distributor FAE teams.
## Product Demand

Strong demand drivers include: Industrial automation modernization programs in Europe, Electric vehicle production growth in North America, Renewable energy installations globally, and Supply chain diversification away from single-source dependencies.
## LiTong Asia-Pacific Leadership

LiTong Electronics continues as Novosense's core distributor in Asia-Pacific, providing comprehensive support including inventory, technical support, and application engineering. Contact LiTong for Novosense products and support in the Asia-Pacific region.
